notes: Three search piles at Daigle's. SEARCH at a pile draws the top of its stack. Items either pay down CHAIN, alter the room (a song dedication that brings a visitor early), or remind you of something (lore tokens).

bills_under_a_coaster.label: Bills under a coaster
bills_under_a_coaster.flavor: Tucked under the wet one. You forgot you put them there last Tuesday. The room kept them for you.

effects.text: Bills under a coaster. The room held them for you. You add them to the brass clip.

an_unopened_pack_of_matches.label: Unopened matchbook (DAIGLE'S 1987)
an_unopened_pack_of_matches.flavor: From the year the place opened. Lou puts a few out on the bar every Tuesday and they don't get taken.

your_house_key.label: Your house key
your_house_key.flavor: On the clip with the brass keychain. You set it down at some point and the bar set it aside for you. Lou does not say when.

effects.text: Your house key. You hadn't realised you'd lost it.

the_broken_cue_someone_left.label: A broken cue
the_broken_cue_someone_left.flavor: Snapped at the joint. Someone took a bad shot. The bar keeps it around in case anyone wants to remember.

a_crusted_eight_ball.label: A crusted 8-ball
a_crusted_eight_ball.flavor: Off the table, on the rail. Set there because it wouldn't sink. The crust is what dries on a thing nobody touches.

effects.text: You pocket the 8-ball. The pool table looks suddenly incomplete. The room notices.

table_chalk_blue.label: Blue chalk cube
table_chalk_blue.flavor: Worn to a crater on one face. The blue gets under the nail and you can't get it off until Thursday.

the_coin_jar.label: The juke coin jar
the_coin_jar.flavor: Quarters and slugs. The slugs go in fine. Lou is aware. Lou does not care.

a_song_dedication_card.label: A song-dedication card
a_song_dedication_card.flavor: Filled out in someone's handwriting that you might recognise if you let yourself. Track 14, the slow one.

effects.text: You drop the card in the slot. The juke clicks. The slow one cues up next.

an_old_setlist_from_1999.label: A setlist from 1999
an_old_setlist_from_1999.flavor: Folded in the back of the juke, where nobody puts setlists. The handwriting is your own.
